shop.name: Cheche Cabalida
shop.subtitle: Online Shop
shop.tagline: Home accessories & beauty finds, hand-picked for your space and your glow. See something you like? Message us to order.
shop.hours: Open daily · We reply fast on Messenger

promo.text: ✨ New arrivals every week — message us to reserve yours!

howToOrder: Browse the posts below and find what you like.
Tap “Order this” to open the post, or “Message” to chat with us.
Send your order on Messenger — we'll confirm the price, payment, and delivery.

faqs.a: We accept GCash and Cash on Delivery (COD). We'll share the details when you message us.
Yes! Within Iligan City and nationwide via J&T / LBC.
Around 2–4 days for nearby areas and 3–7 days for provincial addresses.

faqs.q: How do I reserve an item?
faqs.a: Just message us on Messenger and we'll set it aside for you.

posts.caption: Sample post — open Manage to add your own and tag each one.
